name: White Mountain Basic Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs into yolks and whites.
2. Make a soft custard by combining the egg yolks, milk, and sugar in a saucepan over medium heat until thickened.
3. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Slowly pour the hot custard mixture into the beaten egg whites while continuously whisking to incorporate without deflating the eggs.
5. Add vanilla extract and salt once the mixture is cool, then fold in the whipped cream.
6. Pour the mixture into a container with a tight-fitting lid and freeze according to your freezer instructions.
7. The recipe yields approximately 2 quarts of ice cream.
